text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I happen to hear a gloomy voice<n>coming from the
back of the school<n>building as I'm walking by.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hoho? Hehe... are you in need of
Mati-kan't-get-any-luck-itaru?!

text_block_list.name: Mati-kan't-get-any-luck-itaru(?)
text_block_list.text:
You heard that right... I've got a new<n>name. My
motivation, my energy, my<n>luck... it's all gone...

text_block_list.name: Mati-kan't-get-any-luck-itaru(?)
text_block_list.text:
The great Shiraoki did say, "The more<n>you run, the
more possibilities will<n>come upon you." But... all
this running<n>has only made me all weak and
floppy.

text_block_list.name: Mati-kan't-get-any-luck-itaru(?)
text_block_list.text:
None of my spells or prayers are<n>working. I don't
know what to do<n>anymore...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Running back-to-back races recently<n>is taking its
toll on her. I'd better<n>adjust her race schedule...
